initial_access_vector: Unauthenticated access to an internet-exposed Kubernetes administrative console that was not password protected
persistence_mechanism: Use of stolen AWS credentials found in a Kubernetes pod to access the broader Tesla AWS environment
privilege_escalation: Credentials for broader Tesla AWS environment retrieved from a Kubernetes pod

techniques.evidence_quote: this particular Kubernetes console—an administrative portal for cloud application management—wasn't password protected and could therefore be accessed by anyone
one of the console's "pods," or storage containers, included login credentials for a broader Tesla Amazon Web Services cloud environment

techniques.technique_name: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Application Access Token
techniques.evidence_quote: This allowed them to burrow deeper
deploying scripts to establish their cryptojacking operation
the mining server also used a proxy server as an intermediary to mask it and make it less traceable
communicated with the attacker's server on an unusual IP port
The attack communications all happened over SSL web encryption to hide their content from security-monitoring tools
the attackers obtained free proxying services and the SSL certificate from the internet infrastructure firm Cloudflare
Tesla's Amazon Web Services cloud infrastructure was running mining malware in a far-reaching and well-hidden cryptojacking campaign

attack_chain.description: Attackers discovered Tesla's Kubernetes administrative console exposed to the internet without password protection, allowing anyone to access it.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: this particular Kubernetes console...wasn't password protected and could therefore be accessed by anyone

attack_chain.description: Within the Kubernetes console, attackers found a pod that contained AWS login credentials for Tesla's broader AWS environment.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: one of the console's "pods," or storage containers, included login credentials for a broader Tesla Amazon Web Services cloud environment

evidence_chunks.quote: one of the console's "pods," or storage containers, included login credentials for a broader Tesla Amazon Web Services cloud environment
one of the console's "pods," or storage containers, included login credentials for a broader Tesla Amazon Web Services cloud environment

attack_chain.technique_name: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Application Access Token
attack_chain.description: Attackers used the stolen AWS credentials to access the broader Tesla AWS cloud environment and move laterally.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: This allowed them to burrow deeper

evidence_chunks.quote: This allowed them to burrow deeper
This allowed them to burrow deeper

attack_chain.description: Attackers deployed scripts via the Kubernetes console to set up their cryptomining operation.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: deploying scripts to establish their cryptojacking operation, which was built on the popular Stratum bitcoin mining protocol

evidence_chunks.quote: deploying scripts to establish their cryptojacking operation, which was built on the popular Stratum bitcoin mining protocol
deploying scripts to establish their cryptojacking operation, which was built on the popular Stratum bitcoin mining protocol

attack_chain.description: Attackers routed mining C2 traffic through a Cloudflare proxy to mask the mining server's true IP and hinder tracing.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the mining server also used a proxy server as an intermediary to mask it and make it less traceable

evidence_chunks.quote: the mining server also used a proxy server as an intermediary to mask it and make it less traceable
the mining server also used a proxy server as an intermediary to mask it and make it less traceable

attack_chain.description: Mining C2 traffic was wrapped in SSL using a Cloudflare-issued certificate to conceal content from security monitoring.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: The attack communications all happened over SSL web encryption to hide their content from security-monitoring tools

evidence_chunks.quote: The attack communications all happened over SSL web encryption to hide their content from security-monitoring tools
The attack communications all happened over SSL web encryption to hide their content from security-monitoring tools

attack_chain.description: Mining malware communicated with the attacker's server over an unusual IP port to evade port-scanner detection.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: communicated with the attacker's server on an unusual IP port, making it less likely that a port scanner would detect it as malicious

evidence_chunks.quote: communicated with the attacker's server on an unusual IP port, making it less likely that a port scanner would detect it as malicious
communicated with the attacker's server on an unusual IP port, making it less likely that a port scanner would detect it as malicious

attack_chain.description: Attackers ran cryptocurrency mining (Stratum mining protocol) on Tesla's AWS cloud infrastructure, consuming CPU and electricity.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Tesla's Amazon Web Services cloud infrastructure was running mining malware in a far-reaching and well-hidden cryptojacking campaign

evidence_chunks.quote: Tesla's Amazon Web Services cloud infrastructure was running mining malware in a far-reaching and well-hidden cryptojacking campaign
